mapper.select: SELECT ps.status_code FROM partner p LEFT JOIN partner_status ps ON p.partner_id = ps.partner_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, ps.reg_date DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.partner_id as partnerId, p.member_id as memberId, p.partner_name as partnerName, p.contact_name as contactName, p.contact_phone as contactPhone, p.contact_email as contactEmail, p.has_exp as expStatus, p.business_number as businessNumber, p.partner_intro as partnerIntro, p.bank_name as bankName, p.account_number as accountNumber, ps.status_code as status, ps.memo as rejectReason, p.created_at as createdAt FROM partner p LEFT JOIN partner_status ps ON p.partner_id = ps.partner_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, ps.reg_date DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PLACE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO place ( place_id, partner_id, category, place_name, address, latitude, longitude, createdtime ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, #{partnerId}, 'ACCOMMODATION', #{partnerName}, '심사 중', 0, 0, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO accommodation (place_id, checkintime, checkouttime, af_id) VALUES (#{placeId}, '15:00', '11:00', 'AF' || #{placeId})
mapper.select: SELECT p.partner_id as partnerId, p.member_id as memberId, p.partner_name as partnerName, p.contact_name as contactName, p.contact_phone as contactPhone, p.contact_email as contactEmail, p.has_exp as expStatus, p.business_number as businessNumber, p.partner_intro as partnerIntro, p.bank_name as bankName, p.account_number as accountNumber, ps.status_code as status, ps.memo as rejectReason, p.created_at as createdAt FROM partner p LEFT JOIN partner_status ps ON p.partner_id = ps.partner_id WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId} ORDER BY ps.reg_date DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
